narrative:
Chesterfield Twp township has 644 registered voters, with 48.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.8 percentage points.
